map_bindings.AlbedoAtlas: BaseColor candidate Texture2D atlas sampled by M_RaftSim_AtlasSampleReview through AtlasTileOriginScale and AtlasBlendWeight.
map_bindings.NormalAtlas: Normal candidate Texture2D atlas sampled by M_RaftSim_AtlasSampleReview and blended by NormalIntensity.
map_bindings.AORoughnessHeightAtlas: Packed R=AO, G=roughness, B=height candidate Texture2D atlas sampled by M_RaftSim_AtlasSampleReview into ambient occlusion, roughness, and preview pixel-depth offset.

promotion_gate: Review material-instance assets, bound Texture2D atlas assets, and the atlas sampler parent material are created, but production promotion still requires production material instances, capture comparison, guide/geospatial review, hazard readability, and desktop/VR performance evidence.
current_decision: Use these reviewed Unreal Material Instance Constant assets as the canonical handoff from first-party atlas Texture2D assets to shader work. The editor automation now creates the nine atlas Texture2D review assets, creates the M_RaftSim_AtlasSampleReview parent material with albedo, normal, AO, roughness, and height sampler wiring, and parents all 18 MI_RaftSim_*_AtlasCandidate assets to it. They remain review-only until production material promotion, capture comparison, guide/geospatial review, hazard readability, and performance gates pass.
